query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM conversion_check_items WHERE user_id IS NULL;
SELECT category_index, category_name, COUNT(*) as item_count FROM conversion_check_items WHERE user_id IS NULL GROUP BY category_index, category_name ORDER BY category_index;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Vy724JxA6DGk2d.root --database a79tkwusxJ5HWpLxCXSSXN --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM conversion_check_items WHERE user_id IS NULL;
SELECT category_index, category_name, COUNT(*) as item_count FROM conversion_check_items WHERE user_id IS NULL GROUP BY category_index, category_name ORDER BY category_index;
